hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
input=$(cat)
tier=$(cat .agent-forge-state/tier 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
if [ "$tier" != "micro" ] && [ "$tier" != "unknown" ]; then
  qr_done=$(cat .agent-forge-state/qr-done 2>/dev/null || echo "no")
  if [ "$qr_done" != "yes" ]; then
    echo '[agent-forge] QR gate not executed. Run /qr-gate or /milestone before committing.' >&2
  fi
fi
echo "$input"

#!/bin/bash
input=$(cat)
command=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null || echo "$input")
pr_number=$(echo "$command" | grep -oE '[0-9]+' | head -1)
repo=$(echo "$command" | grep -oE '--repo [^ ]+' | sed 's/--repo //')
safe_name="${repo##*/}-pr-${pr_number}"
review_file=".agent-forge-state/reviews/${safe_name}.json"
if [ ! -f "$review_file" ] 2>/dev/null; then
  echo '[agent-forge] No review record found. Run /pr-review first for a thorough review.' >&2
fi
echo "$input"

#!/bin/bash
tier=$(cat .agent-forge-state/tier 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
if [ "$tier" != "unknown" ]; then
  echo '[agent-forge] Session ending. Checklist:' >&2
  echo '  - delta-log recorded? (/delta-log)' >&2
  echo '  - rolling-summary updated?' >&2
  echo '  - token metrics collected? (token_session_export)' >&2
  echo '  - handoff.md generated? (/handoff)' >&2
fi
# pending review reminder
pending=$(ls .agent-forge-state/reviews/*.json 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
if [ "$pending" -gt 0 ] 2>/dev/null; then
  echo "[agent-forge] Pending reviews: ${pending} PR(s) reviewed this session." >&2
fi
